betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Lithium, Graphite & Asbestos§f

§aEssential structural and functional materials for reactors, insulation, and nuclear weapons!§f

§6Lithium§f (atomic number 3):
• Semi-rare white alkali metal, extremely hydrophobic (explodes if wet)
• Found in schist ore, nether quartz (centrifuge), meteorites, and crystal electrolysis
§bUses§f:
  • Lithium-Ion Batteries§f — lithium dust + cobalt
  • Thermonuclear Warheads§f — creates tritium on detonation for fusion stage
  • Breeding Reactors§f — lithium rods breed into tritium for fusion reactors
  • Custom Nuke§f — contributes 20 to hydrogen/thermonuclear stage yield

§6Graphite§f:
• Crystalline carbon allotrope, neutron moderator
• Production: press Lignite Coke with Flat Stamp → Graphite Ingot; or acidize Coal blocks with Hydrogen Peroxide
§bUses§f:
  • RBMK Control Rods§f and §bModerated Columns§f
  • Graphite Electrodes§f for Arc Furnace
  • Watz Fuel Pellets§f
  • Chicago Pile§f — drilled graphite blocks + fuel rods
  • ZIRNOX Reactor§f — 16 Graphite Ingots required
  • Crucible§f — 1:1 carbon source

§6Asbestos§f:
• Rare silicate mineral with insulating and fire-resistant properties
• §cToxic§f when airborne — causes lung damage without protection
• Found as underground ore or chrysotile cave walls (shred → powder)
§bUses§f:
  • Insulators§f — 2 Asbestos Sheets → 16 Insulators (very efficient)
  • Asbestos Concrete§f — for RBMK columns (8 per column)
  • Laboratory Tiles§f
  • Breeding Reactor§f, XSAPI inserts, digamma diagnostics

§eTip§f: Set up a §boil/schist processing chain§f for lithium. For asbestos, you only need modest amounts. Graphite production from lignite coke is the most straightforward path!
